---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? (e.g. "I want to track inventory without formulas")

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like smartsh!t to do.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Would you contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can help implement this
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting
